---
title: "Posts"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

Research notes, experiments, and projects. Updated as I learn things worth writing down.
